## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update

## 🛡️ CorePulse Engineering Checklist
- [ ] My code strictly follows the WordPress PHP Coding Standards.
- [ ] I have NOT added any external JavaScript libraries (Zero-Dependency Frontend).
- [ ] Any new diagnostic UI is strictly isolated using `current_user_can('manage_options')`.
- [ ] I have tested these changes locally and verified they do not negatively impact Core Web Vitals.
- [ ] I have updated the Technical Wiki if this PR introduces a new Engine or major logic change.
